_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-06 07:28:46Z)**_

I've seen enough of the diff. Here's my review:

---

## Changes Summary

**4 areas of change:**

1. **`.prettierrc`** — printWidth 90→80, added `endOfLine: "lf"`
2. **`index.css`** — All text color tokens bumped significantly brighter (e.g. `text-primary` 91%→98%, `text-secondary` 72%→88%)
3. **`About.tsx`** — Typography scale increases throughout, layout restructuring, new footer with attribution links
4. **`package.json` / `package-lock.json`** — Added `@types/node`, `knip`, `typescript` as root devDependencies

## Issues

### Broken JSX nesting (About.tsx)

The Popover.Portal and closing tags got misaligned during the restructure. Around the end of the dialog:

```jsx
    </Dialog.Portal>
  )
}
      </AnimatePresence >
    </Dialog.Root >
```

There's a stray `)`/`}` that looks like an accidental function boundary, plus extra spaces before `>` on `AnimatePresence` and `Dialog.Root` closing tags. This will likely cause a build error or render incorrectly.

### Text token values are very bright now

The new values push everything much lighter:
- `text-primary`: 91% → 98% (near-white — may wash out on dark backgrounds)
- `text-secondary`: 72% → 88%  
- `text-tertiary`: 60% → 80%
- `text-faint`: 50% → 60%

This compresses the hierarchy — the gap between `primary` and `secondary` is now only 10% instead of 19%. The "dense but legible" principle relies on clear hierarchy through opacity/weight differences, and this tighter range may undermine that.

### Type scale jump in About dialog

Many elements jumped 2-3 sizes (e.g. `text-2xs` → `text-sm`, `text-base` → `text-2xl`). The section headers went from `text-base` to `text-xl`/`text-2xl`. Combined with the dialog going from `text-base` to `text-lg` base, this is a significant density reduction — worth verifying it still fits well in the viewport without excessive scrolling.

### Indentation inconsistency in hue values section

The nested `flex` divs around H/S/L values (lines ~264-273 in the diff) have mismatched indentation — the inner `<div className="flex gap-1">` blocks aren't consistently indented relative to their parent.

### Root devDependencies

`knip`, `@types/node`, and `typescript` were added to the root `package.json` rather than `app/package.json`. Is that intentional? The app code lives in `app/`, so these might belong there unless you're using knip at the monorepo root level.

---

Want me to fix the broken JSX nesting, or would you rather address these yourself?

---

_**User (2026-04-06 07:30:38Z)**_

yes fix broken jsx nesting

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-06 07:45:01Z)**_

Here's the usage breakdown with the current (brightened) values:

| Token | Value | Usage count | Role |
|---|---|---|---|
| `text-primary` | 98% | 12 | Headings, active values, button text |
| `text-secondary` | 88% | 14 | Section titles, active links, important labels |
| `text-tertiary` | 80% | 16 | Slider labels, axis labels, metadata |
| `text-muted` | 76% | 10 | Body text, descriptions, hover states on links |
| `text-subtle` | 70% | 11 | Inactive controls, secondary nav, placeholders |
| `text-faint` | 60% | 17 | Footnotes, captions, disabled-feeling text |

You're right that **muted (76%) and subtle (70%)** are only 6% apart, and **tertiary (80%) and muted (76%)** are only 4% apart. That middle band of 70-80% is doing too much work for too little visual distinction.

I'd suggest collapsing to **4 tokens**:

| Token | Proposed value | Absorbs |
|---|---|---|
| `text-primary` | 98% | _(unchanged)_ |
| `text-secondary` | 85% | current secondary + tertiary |
| `text-muted` | 68% | current muted + subtle |
| `text-faint` | 55% | _(unchanged, slightly dimmer for more gap)_ |

This gives ~13-15% gaps between each step — enough to actually read as distinct on screen. The semantic roles map cleanly: primary for emphasis, secondary for labels/metadata, muted for body/inactive, faint for footnotes/captions.

Want me to go ahead with this, or do you want to adjust the proposed values?

```text
4	import { Triangle } from "@phosphor-icons/react";
5	import { SaturationCurve } from "./SaturationCurve";
6	import { EffectiveSaturation } from "./EffectiveSaturation";

11	interface ChartTabsProps {

13	}

15	export function ChartTabs({ entries }: ChartTabsProps) {
16	  const [showDots, setShowDots] = useState(true);
17	  const [showCompare, setShowCompare] = useState(false);
18	  const hue = usePaletteStore((s) => s.hue);
19	  const saturation = usePaletteStore((s) => s.saturation);
20	
21	  const { unadjustedColors, adjustedColors } = useMemo(() => ({
22	    unadjustedColors: entries.map((e) =>
23	      chroma.hsl(hue, saturation, e.lightness / 100).hex(),
24	    ),
25	    adjustedColors: entries.map((e) => e.hex),
26	  }), [entries, hue, saturation]);
27	
28	  return (
29	    <div className="mx-4 md:mx-0 rounded-none border border-border-default bg-surface-raised overflow-hidden lg:mr-4">
30	      <div className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between md:hidden lg:flex">
31	        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-center w-full uppercase text-text-tertiary tracking-wider">
32	          Saturation Curve
33	        </h2>
34	      </div>
35	      <Tabs.Root defaultValue="adjustment">
36	        <Tabs.List className="flex border-y border-border-default">
37	          <Tabs.Trigger
38	            value="adjustment"
39	            className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 md:px-2 md:py-2 lg:px-4 lg:py-2 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider md:tracking-normal lg:tracking-wider text-text-subtle cursor-pointer transition-colors data-[state=active]:text-text-primary border-r border-border-default"
40	          >
41	            Adjustment
42	          </Tabs.Trigger>
43	          <Tabs.Trigger
44	            value="computed"
45	            className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider md:tracking-normal lg:tracking-wider text-text-subtle cursor-pointer transition-colors data-[state=active]:text-text-primary"
46	          >
47	            Computed
48	          </Tabs.Trigger>
49	        </Tabs.List>
50	        <Tabs.Content value="adjustment" forceMount className="data-[state=inactive]:hidden">
51	          <h3 className="sr-only">Adjustment <span>multiplier</span></h3>
52	          <SaturationCurve entries={entries} showDots={showDots} />
53	        </Tabs.Content>
54	        <Tabs.Content value="computed" forceMount className="data-[state=inactive]:hidden">
55	          <h3 className="sr-only">Computed <span>values</span></h3>
56	          <EffectiveSaturation entries={entries} showDots={showDots} />
57	        </Tabs.Content>
58	      </Tabs.Root>
59	      <div className="px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between md:hidden lg:flex">
60	        <button
61	          type="button"
62	          onClick={() => setShowCompare(!showCompare)}
63	          className="text-sm text-text-subtle font-semibold cursor-pointer select-none hover:text-text-muted transition-colors md:hidden lg:inline-flex lg:items-center lg:gap-1"
64	        >
65	          <Triangle size={7} weight="fill" className={`transition-transform ${showCompare ? "rotate-180" : "rotate-90"}`} /> Compare
66	        </button>
67	        <ToggleSwitch label="steps" checked={showDots} onChange={setShowDots} />
68	      </div>
69	      {showCompare && (
70	        <div className="px-4 pb-3 space-y-2 md:hidden lg:block">
71	          <div>
72	            <span className="text-xs text-text-faint block mb-1">Unadjusted</span>
73	            <div className="h-6 rounded-none overflow-hidden grid grid-flow-col auto-cols-fr">
74	              {unadjustedColors.map((c, i) => (

76	              ))}
77	            </div>
78	          </div>
79	          <div>
80	            <span className="text-xs text-text-faint block mb-1">Adjusted</span>
81	            <div className="h-6 rounded-none overflow-hidden grid grid-flow-col auto-cols-fr">
82	              {adjustedColors.map((c, i) => (
83	                <div key={i} style={{ backgroundColor: c }} />
84	              ))}
85	            </div>
86	          </div>
87	        </div>
88	      )}
89	    </div>
90	  );
```

```text
1	import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
2	import chroma from "chroma-js";
3	import * as Popover from "@radix-ui/react-popover";
4	import { usePaletteStore } from "../../store/paletteStore";
5	import { parseTargetColor, formatTargetColor } from "../../lib/colors";
6	import type { ColorFormat } from "../../lib/colors";
7	
8	const PICKER_SIZE = 200;
9	
10	function ColorInput({ currentHex, sourceInput, sourceFormat, hue, saturation, onApply }: {
11	  currentHex: string;
12	  sourceInput: string | null;
13	  sourceFormat: ColorFormat | null;
14	  hue: number;
15	  saturation: number;
16	  onApply: (hue: number, saturation: number, input: string, format: ColorFormat) => void;
17	}) {
18	  const [value, setValue] = useState("");
19	  const [isInvalid, setIsInvalid] = useState(false);
20	
21	  const targetFormatted = sourceFormat
22	    ? formatTargetColor(hue, saturation, sourceFormat)
23	    : currentHex;
24	
25	  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
26	    if (e.key === "Enter") {
27	      const result = parseTargetColor(value);
28	      if (result) {
29	        onApply(result.hue, result.saturation, value.trim(), result.format);
30	        setValue("");
31	        setIsInvalid(false);
32	      } else {
33	        setIsInvalid(true);
34	      }
35	    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
36	      setValue("");
37	      setIsInvalid(false);
38	      (e.target as HTMLInputElement).blur();
39	    }
40	  };
41	
42	  return (
43	    <div className="mt-2">
44	      <div className="mb-1.5 space-y-0.5">
45	        {sourceInput ? (
46	          <>
47	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
48	              <span className="text-3xs text-text-faint uppercase tracking-wider">Input</span>
49	              <span className="text-xs font-mono text-text-subtle">{sourceInput}</span>
50	            </div>
51	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
52	              <span className="text-3xs text-text-faint uppercase tracking-wider">H+S at L50</span>
53	              <span className="text-xs font-mono text-text-secondary">{targetFormatted}</span>
54	            </div>
55	          </>
56	        ) : (
57	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
58	            <span className="text-3xs text-text-faint uppercase tracking-wider">Target</span>
59	            <span className="text-xs font-mono text-text-secondary">{currentHex}</span>
60	          </div>
61	        )}
62	      </div>
63	      <input
64	        type="text"
65	        value={value}
66	        onChange={(e) => { setValue(e.target.value); setIsInvalid(false); }}
67	        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
68	        placeholder="#hex, rgb(), hsl(), oklch()"
69	        className={`w-full bg-surface-base border px-2 py-1.5 text-xs font-mono text-text-primary placeholder:text-text-faint outline-none transition-colors ${isInvalid ? "border-red-500" : "border-border-default focus:border-text-subtle"}`}
70	      />
71	    </div>
72	  );
73	}
74	
75	export function TargetSwatch() {
76	  const hue = usePaletteStore((s) => s.hue);
77	  const saturation = usePaletteStore((s) => s.saturation);
78	  const setHue = usePaletteStore((s) => s.setHue);
79	  const setSaturation = usePaletteStore((s) => s.setSaturation);
80	  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);
81	  const draggingRef = useRef(false);
82	  const [sourceInput, setSourceInput] = useState<string | null>(null);
83	  const [sourceFormat, setSourceFormat] = useState<ColorFormat | null>(null);
84	  const [sourceHue, setSourceHue] = useState<number | null>(null);
85	  const [sourceSat, setSourceSat] = useState<number | null>(null);
86	
87	  // Clear source when hue/sat diverge from what the input set
88	  const effectiveSourceInput = (
89	    sourceInput && sourceHue === hue && sourceSat === saturation
90	  ) ? sourceInput : null;
91	  const effectiveSourceFormat = effectiveSourceInput ? sourceFormat : null;
92	
93	  const color = `hsl(${hue}, ${saturation * 100}%, 50%)`;
94	  const currentHex = useMemo(() => chroma.hsl(hue, saturation, 0.5).hex(), [hue, saturation]);
95	
96	  const drawPicker = useCallback(
97	    (canvas: HTMLCanvasElement) => {
98	      const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
99	      if (!ctx) return;
100	      const w = PICKER_SIZE;
101	      const h = PICKER_SIZE;
102	
103	      // Draw hue (x) vs saturation (y) at L=50%
104	      const imageData = ctx.createImageData(w, h);
105	      for (let y = 0; y < h; y++) {
106	        for (let x = 0; x < w; x++) {
107	          const h360 = (x / (w - 1)) * 360;
108	          const s = 1 - y / (h - 1);
109	          // HSL to RGB conversion
110	          const c = (1 - Math.abs(2 * 0.5 - 1)) * s;
111	          const hp = h360 / 60;
112	          const x2 = c * (1 - Math.abs((hp % 2) - 1));
113	          let r1 = 0,
114	            g1 = 0,
115	            b1 = 0;
116	          if (hp < 1) {
117	            r1 = c;
118	            g1 = x2;
119	          } else if (hp < 2) {
120	            r1 = x2;
121	            g1 = c;
122	          } else if (hp < 3) {
123	            g1 = c;
124	            b1 = x2;
125	          } else if (hp < 4) {
126	            g1 = x2;
127	            b1 = c;
128	          } else if (hp < 5) {
129	            r1 = x2;
130	            b1 = c;
131	          } else {
132	            r1 = c;
133	            b1 = x2;
134	          }
135	          const m = 0.5 - c / 2;
136	          const i = (y * w + x) * 4;
137	          imageData.data[i] = Math.round((r1 + m) * 255);
138	          imageData.data[i + 1] = Math.round((g1 + m) * 255);
139	          imageData.data[i + 2] = Math.round((b1 + m) * 255);
140	          imageData.data[i + 3] = 255;
141	        }
142	      }
143	      ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
144	
145	      // Draw crosshair at current hue/sat position
146	      const cx = (hue / 360) * (w - 1);
147	      const cy = (1 - saturation) * (h - 1);
148	      ctx.strokeStyle = "white";
149	      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
150	      ctx.beginPath();
151	      ctx.arc(cx, cy, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
152	      ctx.stroke();
153	      ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.4)";
154	      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
155	      ctx.beginPath();
156	      ctx.arc(cx, cy, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
157	      ctx.stroke();
158	    },
159	    [hue, saturation],
160	  );
161	
162	  const handleCanvasRef = useCallback(
163	    (canvas: HTMLCanvasElement | null) => {
164	      canvasRef.current = canvas;
165	      if (canvas) drawPicker(canvas);
166	    },
167	    [drawPicker],
168	  );
169	
170	  const pickFromCoords = useCallback(
171	    (clientX: number, clientY: number) => {
172	      const canvas = canvasRef.current;
173	      if (!canvas) return;
174	      const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
175	      if (
176	        clientX < rect.left ||
177	        clientX > rect.right ||
178	        clientY < rect.top ||
179	        clientY > rect.bottom
180	      ) return;
181	      const x = (clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
182	      const y = (clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
183	      setHue(Math.round(x * 360));
184	      setSaturation(parseFloat((1 - y).toFixed(2)));
185	      setSourceInput(null);
186	      setSourceFormat(null);
187	    },
188	    [setHue, setSaturation],
189	  );
190	
191	  const handleMouseDown = useCallback(
192	    (e: React.MouseEvent<HTMLCanvasElement>) => {
193	      e.preventDefault();
194	      draggingRef.current = true;
195	      pickFromCoords(e.clientX, e.clientY);
196	    },
197	    [pickFromCoords],
198	  );
199	
200	  useEffect(() => {
201	    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => {
202	      if (draggingRef.current) pickFromCoords(e.clientX, e.clientY);
203	    };
204	    const handleMouseUp = () => {
205	      draggingRef.current = false;
206	    };
207	    document.addEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);
208	    document.addEventListener("mouseup", handleMouseUp);
209	    return () => {
210	      document.removeEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);
211	      document.removeEventListener("mouseup", handleMouseUp);
212	    };
213	  }, [pickFromCoords]);
214	
215	  return (
216	    <Popover.Root>
217	      <Popover.Trigger asChild>
218	        <button
219	          type="button"
220	          className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 shrink-0 self-end cursor-pointer group"
221	          aria-label={`Target color: ${currentHex}`}
222	        >
223	          <div
224	            className="w-7 h-7 rounded-full border-2 border-surface-base transition-transform group-hover:scale-110 shadow-[0_0_0_1px_rgba(255,255,255,0.15)]"
225	            style={{ backgroundColor: color }}
226	          />
227	          <span className="text-3xs font-mono text-text-faint group-hover:text-text-subtle transition-colors">{currentHex}</span>
228	        </button>
229	      </Popover.Trigger>
230	      <Popover.Portal>
231	        <Popover.Content
232	          sideOffset={8}
233	          className="rounded-none bg-surface-overlay border border-border-elevated shadow-xl p-3 z-[60]"
234	        >
235	          <canvas
236	            ref={handleCanvasRef}
237	            width={PICKER_SIZE}
238	            height={PICKER_SIZE}
239	            className="cursor-crosshair block"
240	            style={{ width: PICKER_SIZE, height: PICKER_SIZE }}
241	            onMouseDown={handleMouseDown}
242	          />
243	          <div className="flex justify-between mt-2 text-sm text-text-subtle">
244	            <span>Hue {hue}°</span>
245	            <span>Sat {Math.round(saturation * 100)}%</span>
246	          </div>
247	          <ColorInput
248	            currentHex={currentHex}
249	            sourceInput={effectiveSourceInput}
250	            sourceFormat={effectiveSourceFormat}
251	            hue={hue}
252	            saturation={saturation}
253	            onApply={(h, s, input, format) => { setHue(h); setSaturation(s); setSourceInput(input); setSourceFormat(format); setSourceHue(h); setSourceSat(s); }}
254	          />
255	          <Popover.Arrow className="fill-surface-overlay" />
256	        </Popover.Content>
257	      </Popover.Portal>
258	    </Popover.Root>
259	  );
260	}
261
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
57	                </Dialog.Description>
58	                <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
59	                  <FormatSelector
60	                    format={format}
61	                    onFormatChange={setFormat}
62	                    space={space}
63	                    onSpaceChange={setSpace}
64	                  />
65	                  <ExportPreview
66	                    code={code}
67	                    onDownload={() => downloadPalette(entries, format, space)}
68	                  />
69	                </div>
70	                <Dialog.Close asChild>
71	                  <button
72	                    type="button"
73	                    className="absolute top-4 right-4 text-text-subtle hover:text-text-secondary transition-colors cursor-pointer"
74	                    aria-label="Close"
75	                  >
76	                    <X size={16} />
77	                  </button>
78	                </Dialog.Close>
79	              </motion.div>
80	            </Dialog.Content>
81	          </Dialog.Portal>
82	        )}
83	      </AnimatePresence>
84	    </Dialog.Root>
85	  );
86	}
87
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
16	        {label}
17	      </span>
18	      <button
19	        type="button"
20	        role="switch"
21	        aria-checked={checked}
22	        aria-labelledby={id}
23	        onClick={() => onChange(!checked)}
24	        className="relative w-7 h-4 rounded-full transition-colors min-w-[28px]"
25	        style={{
26	          backgroundColor: checked
```

```text
1	import { useRef, useState } from "react";
2	import * as Slider from "@radix-ui/react-slider";
3	import { Lock, LockOpen } from "@phosphor-icons/react";
4	import { usePaletteStore } from "../../store/paletteStore";
5	
6	export function LightnessRange() {
7	  const lMin = usePaletteStore((s) => s.lMin);
8	  const lMax = usePaletteStore((s) => s.lMax);
9	  const setLRange = usePaletteStore((s) => s.setLRange);
10	  const [locked, setLocked] = useState(false);
11	  const prevRef = useRef({ lMin, lMax });
12	
13	  function handleChange([newMin, newMax]: number[]) {
14	    if (!locked) {
15	      prevRef.current = { lMin: newMin, lMax: newMax };
16	      setLRange(newMin, newMax);
17	      return;
18	    }
19	
20	    const minDelta = newMin - prevRef.current.lMin;
21	    const maxDelta = newMax - prevRef.current.lMax;
22	
23	    let finalMin: number;
24	    let finalMax: number;
25	
26	    if (minDelta !== 0) {
27	      // Min thumb moved right → max thumb moves left by same amount
28	      finalMin = newMin;
29	      finalMax = Math.max(prevRef.current.lMax - minDelta, finalMin + 1);
30	    } else {
31	      // Max thumb moved left → min thumb moves right by same amount
32	      finalMax = newMax;
33	      finalMin = Math.min(prevRef.current.lMin - maxDelta, finalMax - 1);
34	    }
35	
36	    finalMin = Math.max(0, finalMin);
37	    finalMax = Math.min(100, finalMax);
38	
39	    prevRef.current = { lMin: finalMin, lMax: finalMax };
40	    setLRange(finalMin, finalMax);
41	  }
42	
43	  return (
44	    <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 flex-1 min-w-[140px] sm:min-w-[200px]">
45	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-1">
46	        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-text-tertiary uppercase tracking-wider">
47	          Range
48	        </span>
49	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
50	          <button
51	            type="button"
52	            onClick={() => setLocked(!locked)}
53	            className={`flex items-center text-sm cursor-pointer transition-colors ${locked ? "text-text-primary" : "text-text-faint"}`}
54	            title={locked ? "Unlock range" : "Lock range span"}
55	          >
56	            {locked ? <Lock size={14} weight="fill" /> : <LockOpen size={14} />}
57	            <span className="ml-0.5">{locked ? "locked" : "lock"}</span>
58	          </button>
59	          <span className="text-base text-text-primary tabular-nums inline-flex">
60	            <span className="w-[2ch] text-right">{lMin}</span>
61	            <span>–</span>
62	            <span className="w-[3ch]">{lMax}</span>
63	          </span>
64	        </div>
65	      </div>
66	      <Slider.Root
67	        className="relative flex items-center select-none touch-none h-5 cursor-pointer"
68	        value={[lMin, lMax]}
69	        min={0}
70	        max={100}
71	        step={1}
72	        minStepsBetweenThumbs={1}
73	        onValueChange={handleChange}
74	      >
75	        <Slider.Track
76	          className="relative grow rounded-full h-[6px] overflow-hidden"
77	          style={{
78	            background: "linear-gradient(to right, hsl(0 0% 0%), hsl(0 0% 100%))",
79	          }}
80	        >
81	          <Slider.Range className="absolute h-full rounded-full bg-surface-active-hover" />
82	        </Slider.Track>
83	        <Slider.Thumb
84	          className="block w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-white shadow-[0_0_0_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3),0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-white/50 transition-transform hover:scale-110"
85	          aria-label="Minimum lightness"
86	        />
87	        <Slider.Thumb
88	          className="block w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-white shadow-[0_0_0_1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3),0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-white/50 transition-transform hover:scale-110"
89	          aria-label="Maximum lightness"
90	        />
91	      </Slider.Root>
92	    </div>
93	  );
94	}
```

```text
1	import * as Select from "@radix-ui/react-select";
2	
3	interface InlineSelectProps<T extends string> {
4	  label: string;
5	  value: T;
6	  onChange: (value: T) => void;
7	  options: { value: T; label: string }[];
8	}
9	
10	export function InlineSelect<T extends string>({ label, value, onChange, options }: InlineSelectProps<T>) {
11	  const selectedLabel = options.find((o) => o.value === value)?.label ?? value;
12	  const longestLabel = options.reduce((a, b) => (a.label.length > b.label.length ? a : b)).label;
13	
14	  return (
15	    <Select.Root value={value} onValueChange={onChange}>
16	      <Select.Trigger asChild>
17	        <button type="button" aria-label={label} className="group inline-flex items-baseline gap-1 min-h-6 cursor-pointer text-sm whitespace-nowrap outline-none bg-surface-raised border border-border-default px-3 py-1.5 transition-colors">
18	          <span className="text-text-tertiary group-hover:text-white group-active:text-white group-data-[state=open]:text-white transition-colors">{label}</span>
19	          <span className="relative text-text-subtle text-right group-hover:text-white group-active:text-white group-data-[state=open]:text-white transition-colors">
20	            {/* Invisible sizer for stable width */}
21	            <span className="invisible" aria-hidden="true">{longestLabel}</span>
22	            <span className="absolute inset-0 text-right">{selectedLabel}</span>
23	          </span>
24	        </button>
25	      </Select.Trigger>
26	      <Select.Portal>
27	        <Select.Content
28	          position="popper"
29	          sideOffset={-1}
30	          align="end"
31	          className="bg-surface-raised border border-t-0 border-border-default shadow-lg"
32	        >
33	          <Select.Viewport>
34	            {options.map((opt) => (
35	              <Select.Item
36	                key={opt.value}
37	                value={opt.value}
38	                className="flex items-center justify-end px-3 min-h-6 text-sm text-text-subtle cursor-pointer outline-none data-[highlighted]:bg-surface-hover data-[highlighted]:text-white"
39	              >
40	                <Select.ItemText>{opt.label}</Select.ItemText>
41	              </Select.Item>
42	            ))}
43	          </Select.Viewport>
44	        </Select.Content>
45	      </Select.Portal>
46	    </Select.Root>
47	  );
48	}
49
```

```text
43	### Color Tokens
44	All colors use semantic tokens - never hardcode HSL values in components.
45	
46	- **Text**: `text-primary` (91%) / `text-secondary` (72%) / `text-tertiary` (60%) / `text-muted` (56%) / `text-subtle` (52%) / `text-faint` (50%)
47	- **Surfaces**: `surface-base` (6%) / `surface-raised` (8%) / `surface-overlay` (10%) / `surface-hover` (12%) / `surface-active` (15%)
48	- **Borders**: `border-default` (12%) / `border-elevated` (15%)
49	- **Strokes (SVG)**: `stroke-grid` / `stroke-axis` / `stroke-secondary` / `stroke-primary`
50	
51	## Design Context
52	
53	### Users
54	Broad spectrum: UI/product designers building color systems, design engineers who care about perceptual accuracy, front-end developers needing neutral palettes for theming, and color theory enthusiasts drawn to the math. All share a baseline fluency with color - nobody needs hand-holding, but the tool should reward exploration at any depth.
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-06 07:58:21Z)**_



That's the tradeoff of collapsing 6 → 4 — the gaps are wider but the bottom end got pushed up to 62% for AAA compliance, which means `faint` isn't actually that faint anymore.

A few options:

1. **Drop AAA to AA for `text-faint`** — AA minimum on `surface-base` (6%) is ~46% lightness. That would let `text-faint` go down to something like 50%, which would read as genuinely dim. Footnotes, captions, and de-emphasized labels arguably don't need AAA.

2. **Keep 4 tokens but redistribute** — e.g. 98 / 80 / 65 / 62. Pushes secondary and muted further apart from primary, giving more room at the bottom. But then secondary-to-muted is only 15% gap.

3. **Go back to 5 tokens** — add `text-subtle` back at ~55% (AA-only) between muted and faint. That gives you a usable dim level without the AAA constraint on everything.

What's your thinking — is strict AAA on every text token a hard requirement, or is AA acceptable for the lowest tier?

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Compute contrast ratios for all text/surface combos

```bash
node -e "
const linearize = c => c <= 0.04045 ? c / 12.92 : Math.pow((c + 0.055) / 1.055, 2.4);
const lum = pct => linearize(pct / 100);
const ratio = (l1, l2) => { const [a, b] = l1 > l2 ? [l1, l2] : [l2, l1]; return (a + 0.05) / (b + 0.05); };

const text = [
  { name: 'primary',   pct: 98 },
  { name: 'secondary', pct: 85 },
  { name: 'muted',     pct: 72 },
  { name: 'faint',     pct: 48 },
];

const bg = [
  { name: 'surface-base',         pct: 4 },
  { name: 'surface-raised',       pct: 8 },
  { name: 'surface-overlay',      pct: 10 },
  { name: 'surface-hover',        pct: 12 },
  { name: 'surface-active',       pct: 15 },
  { name: 'surface-active-hover', pct: 20 },
];

// Header
const pad = (s, n) => s.padEnd(n);
const rpad = (s, n) => s.padStart(n);

console.log(pad('', 22) + text.map(t => rpad(t.name, 12)).join(''));
console.log(pad('', 22) + text.map(t => rpad('L:' + t.pct + '%', 12)).join(''));
console.log('-'.repeat(22 + text.length * 12));

for (const b of bg) {
  const bLum = lum(b.pct);
  let row = pad(b.name + ' (L:' + b.pct + '%)', 22);
  for (const t of text) {
    const tLum = lum(t.pct);
    const r = ratio(tLum, bLum);
    let label = r.toFixed(1) + ':1';
    if (r >= 7) label += ' AAA';
    else if (r >= 4.5) label += ' AA';
    row += rpad(label, 12);
  }
  console.log(row);
}
"
```

I'll create a script that parses the tokens directly from `index.css` so it stays in sync automatically.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-06 11:27:59Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```mjs
#!/usr/bin/env node

/**
 * Parses text and surface color tokens from index.css and prints
 * a contrast-ratio matrix, flagging AA (≥4.5:1) and AAA (≥7:1).
 *
 * Usage: node scripts/contrast-audit.mjs
 */

import { readFileSync } from "node:fs";
import { resolve, dirname } from "node:path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const __dirname = dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const css = readFileSync(
  resolve(__dirname, "../app/src/index.css"),
  "utf-8",
);

// Extract HSL lightness from achromatic tokens: hsl(0 0% L%)
const tokenRe = /--color-(text|surface)-([\w-]+):\s*hsl\(\s*0\s+0%\s+([\d.]+)%\s*\)/g;

const text = [];
const surfaces = [];

for (const m of css.matchAll(tokenRe)) {
  const [, group, name, lightness] = m;
  const entry = { name, pct: parseFloat(lightness) };
  if (group === "text") text.push(entry);
  else surfaces.push(entry);
}

if (!text.length || !surfaces.length) {
  console.error("No tokens found — check index.css format");
  process.exit(1);
}

// sRGB linearization
const linearize = (c) =>
  c <= 0.04045 ? c / 12.92 : Math.pow((c + 0.055) / 1.055, 2.4);
const luminance = (pct) => linearize(pct / 100);
const contrast = (l1, l2) => {
  const [a, b] = l1 > l2 ? [l1, l2] : [l2, l1];
  return (a + 0.05) / (b + 0.05);
};

// Layout
const COL = 14;
const LABEL = 26;
const pad = (s) => s.padStart(COL);
const label = (s) => s.padEnd(LABEL);

// Header
console.log(label("") + text.map((t) => pad(t.name)).join(""));
console.log(label("") + text.map((t) => pad(`L:${t.pct}%`)).join(""));
console.log("-".repeat(LABEL + text.length * COL));

// Rows
let failures = 0;

for (const bg of surfaces) {
  const bLum = luminance(bg.pct);
  let row = label(`${bg.name} (L:${bg.pct}%)`);
  for (const fg of text) {
    const r = contrast(luminance(fg.pct), bLum);
    let tag = "";
    if (r >= 7) tag = " AAA";
    else if (r >= 4.5) tag = " AA";
    else failures++;
    row += pad(`${r.toFixed(1)}:1${tag}`);
  }
  console.log(row);
}

console.log("-".repeat(LABEL + text.length * COL));
console.log(
  `\n${failures === 0 ? "All combinations meet AA." : `${failures} combination(s) below AA (4.5:1).`}`,
);

process.exit(failures > 0 ? 1 : 0);

```

```text
File created successfully at: /Users/grant/code/chroma-curve/scripts/contrast-audit.mjs
```
</details></tool-use>
